metadata.title: How I Increased Website Traffic by 5x Using SEO
metadata.description: A data-driven SEO case study covering keyword research, technical audits, and on-page optimization that led to a 5x organic traffic increase.

heading: How I Increased Website Traffic by 5x Using SEO
subtitle: SEO
author: Md Shakil Hossen

contents.title: Key takeaways
contents.content:
• Targeted keyword research and competitor analysis laid the foundation for a 5x traffic increase.
  • Technical SEO audits and on-page optimization improved crawlability and search engine rankings.
  • Consistent content strategy combined with data-driven decisions accelerated organic growth.

When I joined IRD Foundation as an SEO and Data Analyst, the website was struggling with organic visibility. Search rankings were stagnant, and organic traffic had plateaued for months. I knew that a comprehensive, data-driven SEO strategy could turn things around.

contents.title: The Foundation: Keyword & Competitor Research
contents.content: The first step was understanding the competitive landscape. Using tools like Ahrefs and SEMrush, I conducted thorough keyword research to identify high-volume, low-competition opportunities. I mapped out competitor strategies to find gaps we could exploit.

contents.title: Technical SEO: Fixing the Foundation
contents.content:
A comprehensive technical audit revealed several critical issues:

  • Slow page load times
  • Broken internal links
  • Missing meta descriptions
  • Poor mobile responsiveness

I systematically addressed each issue using Google Search Console data and custom Python scripts to automate the audit process.

After implementing these technical fixes and optimizing the content structure, we saw a dramatic improvement. Within six months, organic traffic increased by 5x and key search rankings moved from page 3-4 to page 1 for our target keywords.
